_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop detailed design documentation for component and interface specifications to support system design and development.
reference_document_element_description: Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, performance characteristics, known limitations, and monitoring recommendations.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.542), AI-T-006 (AI, cosine: 0.538).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.526). Shared vocabulary: [documentation]. DCWF-only terms [component, design, detailed, develop, development, interface] vs WIDAI-only terms [card, characteristics, deployment, known, limitations, model] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.896 (P=0.902, R=0.890). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.4%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Develop detailed design documentation for component and interface specifications" and "Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, per". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.566 ≈ STS 0.526 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [documentation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [documentation]. DCWF-only: [component, design, detailed, develop, development, interface]. WIDAI-only: [card, characteristics, deployment, known, limitations, model].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.4% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.526 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
STS 0.526 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
